datasets.name: 324d1cf5
f1ed5d0e
77f031d0
a6705353
queryLines:
SELECT
  Cluster_Name,
  COUNT(*) AS customers
FROM clustered_customers_kmeans
GROUP BY Cluster_Name
ORDER BY customers DESC;

datasets.name: 6a16e5c7
queryLines:
SELECT
  Cluster_Name,
  ROUND(AVG(Lifetime_Value), 2) AS avg_ltv
FROM clustered_customers_kmeans
GROUP BY Cluster_Name
ORDER BY avg_ltv DESC;

datasets.name: 668a3cdb
queryLines:
SELECT
  Cluster_Name,
  ROUND(AVG(Lifetime_Value), 2) AS avg_ltv
FROM clustered_customers_kmeans
GROUP BY Cluster_Name
ORDER BY avg_ltv DESC
LIMIT 1;

datasets.name: 6c0136ae
queryLines:
SELECT
  Cluster_Name,
  ROUND(AVG(Login_Frequency), 2) AS avg_login_frequency
FROM clustered_customers_kmeans
GROUP BY Cluster_Name
ORDER BY avg_login_frequency DESC;
